name: Butter Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Butter or margarine, softened (2 sticks)
3 cups Martha White All-Purpose Flour, sifted
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter and sugar together in a mixing bowl until light and fluffy.
2. Add egg and vanilla; beat well.
3. Sift flour and baking powder together; blend into the creamed mixture.
4. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
5. Preheat oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Roll out a small amount of dough to 1/8-inch thickness on a lightly floured board or pastry cloth.
7. Keep remaining dough refrigerated until ready to use.
8. Cut into rounds with a 2-1/2 inch cutter; arrange one inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
9. Bake for 5 to 7 minutes, or until light golden brown.
10. Cool on wire racks.
